name: Apple of Eden
Prerequisites: Sacrament: An apple, a drop of Vitae.
Effect: Grants temporary Intelligence and Wits dots and allows a mortal consumer to see supernatural creatures for what they are.

name: Blood Scourge
Prerequisites: Sacrament: The ritualist's own blood (at least one Vitae).
Effect: Transforms a portion of the caster's blood into a stinging whip of Vitae acting as a 2L weapon.

name: Marian Apparition
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A piece of pure white cloth, stained with a single drop of menstrual blood.
Effect: Creates an apparition of a holy figure that inspires fierce spiritual guilt and imposes Humanity detachment penalties on Kindred.

name: Revelatory Shroud
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A cloth shroud.
Effect: The shroud burns to reveal the face of the last person to touch the draped object or walk through the area.

name: Vitae Reliquary
Prerequisites: Sacrament: Any object up to Size 3.
Effect: Infuses an object with Vitae that can be retrieved later by any vampire, Strix, or ghoul touching it.

name: Apparition of the Host
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A holly switch.
Effect: Activating the switch summons an apparition of avenging angels that chases a victim, imposing the Frightened or Spooked Condition.

name: Bloody Icon
Prerequisites: Sacrament: The caster's own Humanity (lose 1 dot), a statue of a saint.
Effect: The statue cries Vitae that counts for feeding restrictions but does not cause addiction.

name: Blandishment of Sin
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A scrap of paper with the victim's name written on it.
Effect: Upgrades the next bashing damage the victim suffers to lethal before the next sunrise (contested vs Resolve + Tolerance per V:tR 2e).

name: Blandishment of Sin (Aggravated)
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A scrap of paper with the victim's name written on it.
Effect: Upgrades the next lethal damage the victim suffers to aggravated before the next sunrise (contested vs Resolve + Tolerance per V:tR 2e).

name: Curse of Babel
Prerequisites: Sacrament: An animal or human tongue.
Effect: Renders the victim unable to speak or write until the next sunrise.

name: Liar's Plague
Prerequisites: Sacrament: An insect carapace.
Effect: Curses the victim to vomit a swarm of beetles if they tell any falsehoods during the next scene.

name: The Walls of Jericho
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A horn; target's Humanity must be low enough.
Effect: Blasting the horn demolishes physical barriers protecting the subject and damages those touching the objects.

name: Aaron's Rod
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A rod or staff.
Effect: Enchants the object to become a venomous serpent that follows commands or attacks a specified target when activated.

name: Malediction of Despair
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A lock of the victim's hair.
Effect: Imposes a -5 dice penalty the next time the victim engages in a specific action chosen by the caster.

name: Gift of Lazarus
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A communion wafer placed under a corpse's tongue.
Effect: Animates a human corpse into an obedient servant that retains all skills it had in life.

name: Blessing the Legion
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A full suit of armor. Vitae equal to caster's Theban Sorcery dots.
Effect: Stores Vitae in the armor that the wearer can expend to rapidly heal wounds.

name: Miracle of the Dead Sun
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A piece of pure silver jewelry; activator sacrifices a dot of Humanity.
Effect: Blots out the sun completely, allowing vampires to operate during the day without penalties.

name: Pledge to the Worthless One
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A person content with his life (who is slain).
Effect: Pledges the subject to Belial, granting frenzy benefits, double Vitae from sinful mortals, a demonic familiar, and physical demonic signs.

name: Great Prophecy
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A body part of a saint.
Effect: Enacts a written prophecy that the Storyteller brings to pass within the next month, causing widespread benefit or Merit destruction.

name: The Guiding Star
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A full, hand-crafted star chart and gold coins.
Effect: Enchants coins that intuitively guide their holders to a miraculously safe and bountiful feeding sanctuary.

name: Apocalypse
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A text at least 300 years old.
Effect: Peels back the Masquerade in a massive area; vampires appear as rotting corpses, and Obfuscate fails completely.

name: The Judgment Fast
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A table of rotten food.
Effect: Curses a domain for a month so that any Vitae stored above a vampire's Humanity acts as mortal food, causing painful regurgitation.

name: Stigmata
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A crucifix.
Effect: Inflicts the wounds of Christ on the victim, causing massive blood and Vitae loss and potentially lethal damage.

name: Transubstantiation
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A drop of liquid gold or water.
Effect: Transforms one substance or creature into another (like lead to gold or a wolf to a cat) until the next sunrise.

name: Curse of Isolation
Prerequisites: Sacrament: Any bladed weapon (Elder rite).
Effect: Severs the bonds between a vampire and their Touchstone, transferring that Touchstone to the caster.

name: Orison of Voices
Prerequisites: Sacrament: Rosary beads (Elder rite).
Effect: The caster hears whenever any voice speaks her name, along with context, for three nights.

name: Sins of the Ancestors
Prerequisites: Sacrament: At least 1 Vitae (for vampires) or 2 lethal health levels (for mortals) of the target's blood (Elder rite).
Effect: Plumbs the target's blood to answer questions about their relatives and descendants.

name: Baptism of Damnation
Prerequisites: Sacrament: Holy water blessed in darkness and a willing or restrained subject.
Effect: Marks the subject with spiritual corruption visible to the faithful; imposes persistent guilt and weakens resistance to further Theban workings until resolved at table.

name: The Rite of Ascending Blood
Prerequisites: Sacrament: A chalice and Vitae from three different Kindred donors.
Effect: Temporarily elevates the ritualist's effective Blood Potency for one night for purposes of resisting predation and contesting supernatural fear; costs and limits at table.
